message:
feat(engine): major engine expansion — module resolver, GC pause tracking,
stdlib ES2020+ builtins, ESM loader, runtime diagnostics CLI, frankenctl,
benchmark harness contract, statistical validation pipeline

Substantial cross-cutting feature additions across the franken-engine core
and extension host:

Module system:
- module_resolver.rs: full ESM import resolution with specifier
  canonicalization, bare-specifier mapping, circular-dependency detection,
  and deterministic BTreeMap-based graph ordering (+540 lines)
- esm_loader.rs: ES module loading pipeline (resolve → fetch → parse →
  link → evaluate) with cycle-safe DFS, live-binding stubs per ES2020
  §15.2.1.16.4, fingerprint-based cache invalidation, and tracing events
  for the evidence ledger (new file, 1463 lines)

Runtime & GC:
- gc_pause.rs: GC pause tracking infrastructure with pause-budget
  accounting, histogram collection, and threshold-breach detection for
  latency-sensitive workloads (+230 lines)
- stdlib.rs: ES2020+ deterministic stdlib baseline with additional
  built-in prototypes, frozen intrinsics, and Realm-isolated bindings
  (+413 lines)

Diagnostics & tooling:
- runtime_diagnostics_cli.rs: extensive new subcommands for live engine
  introspection — memory snapshots, extension health, lease status,
  GC metrics, and batch diagnostic collection (+683 lines)
- runtime_diagnostics.rs (bin): CLI driver expansion with arg parsing
  for new diagnostic subcommands (+269 lines)
- frankenctl.rs: new unified control binary for benchmark orchestration,
  deterministic replay, and evidence artifact generation (new file, 1018
  lines)

Benchmark & validation:
- benchmark_e2e.rs: add BenchmarkHarnessContract with runtime-pin
  validation (franken-engine, Node LTS, Bun stable), fairness policy
  (warmup, sample count, timeout), environment manifest capture
  (locale, TZ, OS, arch), and expanded evidence artifact paths (+374
  lines)
- performance_statistical_validation.rs: deterministic statistical
  validation pipeline (RGC-702) enforcing variance/confidence guardrails
  for benchmark promotion decisions with fail-closed semantics (new file,
  899 lines)

Cross-repo & lifecycle:
- cross_repo_contract.rs: extended contract surface for multi-repo
  coordination with additional validation rules (+81 lines)
- lease_tracker.rs: enhanced lease lifecycle tracking with expiry
  forecasting and contention metrics (+76 lines)
- franken_lockstep_runner.rs: expanded lockstep runner with additional
  replay modes and evidence collection (+90 lines)
- execution_orchestrator.rs: refined orchestration flow with improved
  budget accounting (+15 lines)
- franken-extension-host/lib.rs: extension host lifecycle hardening
  with additional state transitions and health checks (+164 lines)

Smaller fixes across: flow_lattice, parser_arena, plas_release_gate,
proof_release_gate, security_e2e, observability_quality_sentinel,
demo_claim_linkage_gate, deterministic_replay, engine_object_id,
northstar_scorecard, optimization_baseline, lib.rs

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
